style_host.description: STYLE ONLY — host energy: minimal 2D circle-head narrator over photo/mystery collage. Our host is JONTY (charcoal shirt with red JONTY text, NO red baseball cap, cold face). Use pose/composition energy, not this exact character.

style_host_react.description: STYLE ONLY — host on matte black void, bold outline, restrained reaction. Rebuild as Jonty (black/charcoal shirt, red JONTY chest text, no red cap).

style_fact_card.description: STYLE ONLY — black void fact layout: stylized subject, name tag, red date and red height/stat callouts. Recreate per case; do not copy this exact person.

style_case_scene.description: STYLE ONLY — per-case character on dim real-photo environment, bold 2D outlines, mixed media allowed (photo prop). No gore. New design each case.
